design_philosophy: Professional, premium SaaS aesthetic. Mixing Swiss grid rigidity with organic warmth from the orange accent. Prioritizes high-contrast typography and clear interactive elements.

headings.instructions: Use Cabinet Grotesk for all Headings (H1-H4). Do NOT use Inter for headings. Use tracking-tight or tracking-tighter.
headings.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-none text-[#0A0A0A]

body.instructions: Use Inter for body text, inputs, buttons, and labels.

sections.name: Header & Navigation
sections.instructions: Sticky header (`sticky top-0 z-50`) with crystal glassmorphism (`backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-black/5`). Logo uses Lucide `Mail` icon + `Zap` icon overlapping or grouped, with text 'EmailBoost' in bold primary blue. Nav links (Home, How It Works, Pricing) aligned right, followed by a 'Try Now' CTA in primary blue. No hamburger menu on desktop.

sections.name: Hero Section
sections.instructions:
Massive H1 heading. Background MUST use a subtle CSS radial gradient (`bg-[radial-gradient(ellipse_at_top,_var(--tw-gradient-stops))] from-blue-50/50 via-purple-50/20 to-transparent`) and `react-tsparticles` for animated glowing particles in the background. CTA 'Try Free Demo' in Primary Blue with Lucide `ArrowRight`. 

**Hero Illustration**: DO NOT use a static image. Build a Composite UI Component using HTML/Tailwind: a mock email client window showing subject lines, green 'open rate' percentage badges, and an upward trending chart. Make it float using Framer Motion.

sections.name: How It Works
sections.instructions: Light gray background section (`bg-gray-50/50`). '3 Simple Steps' heading. Use a 3-column grid. Each step should feature a large, prominent numbered circle (Orange background, white text) with a subtle dashed line connecting them horizontally (hidden on mobile). Generous padding (`p-8`) inside step containers.

sections.name: Interactive Demo
sections.instructions:
The core feature. Use the 'Control Room' grid style. A large 2-column layout (1 col on mobile). 
Left side: Form card with Textarea for email draft, Selects for Industry/Type, and an Orange 'Generate' button. 
Right side: Output container with 3-4 rows of generated subject lines. Each row must show the subject text, a predicted open rate (e.g., '48% Open Rate' in green), and a 'Copy' button (Lucide `Copy` icon). Use Shadcn components for inputs and buttons, heavily customized to remove the 'default Vercel look'. Add Toast notification on Copy.

sections.name: Features
sections.instructions: Bento grid layout. 3 cards highlighting: AI-Powered, Ranked by Performance, Industry-Specific. Use 'Neumorphism (Tactile)' style for the cards: `bg-white shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] border border-black/5 rounded-2xl p-8`. Icons in Orange.

sections.name: Pricing
sections.instructions:
3 tier pricing (Free, Pro, Enterprise). 
Pro tier ($19/mo) MUST be elevated (`-translate-y-4 md:-translate-y-8`), featuring a 'BEST VALUE' badge, high-contrast border (`border-primary`), and a prominent Primary Blue CTA. Free and Enterprise cards are stark white with black text and lighter borders.

sections.name: CTA Section
sections.instructions: Dark mode inverted section. Midnight Blue (`#0F172A`) or Primary Blue background to break the light theme rhythm. Large heading 'Join 1000+ marketing teams', Orange 'Start Your Free Trial' button.

sections.name: Footer
sections.instructions: Massive padding (`py-20`). 4 column grid for links, social icons, and a newsletter signup input. Copyright text at the bottom. Background stark white.

image_urls.description: Startup founder portrait for testimonials/social proof
Startup founder portrait for testimonials/social proof

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All buttons must use `hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300`. Links must use `hover:text-primary transition-colors`.
motion_and_interactions.scroll_animations: Use `framer-motion` for scroll-triggered fade-in and slide-up animations. Elements should have `initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} viewport={{ once: true, margin: '-100px' }}`.
motion_and_interactions.hero_animation: Staggered entrance for hero elements. The Hero Illustration (mock UI) must have a continuous slow floating animation (`animate={{ y: [0, -15, 0] }} transition={{ duration: 4, repeat: Infinity, ease: 'easeInOut' }}`).

testing_rules: All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid='pricing-pro-cta'`, `data-testid='generate-subject-lines-btn'`).
